name: Sovereign Skies
description: Lead the Valkyr Ascendancy to prove that air power alone can win the Cordite Wars. Eight missions across escalating conflict, culminating in the Six Fronts.

missions.name: First Sortie
missions.briefing: A Kragmore mining convoy has encroached on Valkyr territory. Commander Aelara orders a precision strike. Deploy Windrunner recon infantry ahead to mark targets from stealth before the strike force commits.
objectives: Deploy Windrunner scouts to mark the Kragmore supply depot
missions.twist: Windrunners are stealthy when stationary — hold them in position to relay targeting data without being spotted.

missions.name: Border War
missions.briefing: Kragmore has responded with armoured columns. Hold the frontier using aerial assets. Kragmore Mole Rat sappers will attempt to slip through under stealth — keep Kestrel detector jets on patrol to expose them before they reach your positions.
objectives: Intercept and destroy Kragmore Mole Rat infiltrators
missions.twist: Kragmore will push armour from two directions at the 5-minute mark while Mole Rat sappers attempt to blow the ridge from beneath. Kestrel jets detect them — don't leave the ridge unpatrolled.

missions.name: The Ironmarch Incursion
missions.briefing: Ironmarch engineers are fortifying positions on Valkyr-controlled land. Disrupt their logistics. Deploy Overwatch Drones ahead of the strike to detect the full extent of Ironmarch construction before committing forces.
objectives: Deploy 3 Overwatch Drones to map the Ironmarch build sites
Prevent enemy fortification of the crossroads
missions.twist: Ironmarch Signal Trucks jam targeting data — destroy them first or your aircraft strike accuracy will suffer.

missions.name: Storm Warning
missions.briefing: Stormrend has entered the war. Their lightning-fast raids are disrupting Valkyr supply lines. Stormrend Flicker Mines are hidden along the supply routes — use Overwatch Drones to sweep ahead of each convoy.
objectives: Use Overwatch Drones to detect and clear Stormrend Flicker Mines before each convoy moves
missions.twist: Stormrend raids supply nodes every 3 minutes, using Flicker Mines as a screen. Overwatch Drones can spot them — but the Drones themselves are soft targets, so keep escort aircraft close.

missions.name: The Naval Threat
missions.briefing: Kragmore dreadnoughts are blockading Valkyr island outposts. The navy must be neutralised. Deploy Depth Hunter submarines to attack from below while the surface fleet engages — and use Tempest Frigates to detect the Kragmore Deep Bore stealth submarines lurking in the straits.
objectives: Use Tempest Frigates to detect and sink Kragmore Deep Bore submarines
missions.twist: Kragmore Deep Bore stealth submarines are invisible without a Tempest Frigate in range. Deploy at least one Frigate before advancing into the straits — the Deep Bores will ambush unescorted ships.

missions.name: Three-Front War
missions.briefing: Valkyr Command is now fighting Kragmore, Ironmarch, AND Stormrend simultaneously. Overwatch Drone corridors must cover all three approach vectors to prevent stealth infiltrators from any faction reaching the core.
objectives: Maintain Overwatch Drone coverage on all 3 approach corridors
missions.twist: Kragmore Mole Rats, Stormrend Flicker Mines, and Ironmarch Trench Diver submarines will each approach stealthed. Enemy factions will periodically call truces to coordinate simultaneous stealth strikes from all three directions.

missions.name: The Betrayal
missions.briefing: Intelligence reveals Arcloft has been selling targeting data to all factions. The Arcloft relay tower must be silenced. Arcloft Vigilant detector jets patrol every approach — use Windrunner scouts to move stealthed to the relay before committing the strike package.
objectives: Infiltrate the relay zone using stationary Windrunner scouts
Escape with at least 3 surviving aircraft
missions.twist: Arcloft Vigilant jets are detector aircraft — they will instantly reveal any moving Windrunner. Use stationary stealth positioning: advance Windrunners one at a time, holding still to stay hidden between movements.

missions.name: Sovereign's Gambit
missions.briefing: The Ironmarch capital at Iron Ridge is within striking range. A decisive aerial assault will end their campaign.
missions.twist: Ironmarch AA batteries cover the approaches — use Interceptors to suppress defences before the main strike.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: All six factions converge on the Cordite Nexus. Valkyr must seize the skies above it and deny all others access. Overwatch Drones and Kestrel jets establish a total detection net — nothing approaches the Nexus without Valkyr knowing first.
objectives: Establish a ring of Overwatch Drones to detect all stealth infiltrators approaching the Nexus
Be the last faction standing in the air
missions.twist: Arcloft Phantom Subs, Kragmore Mole Rats, and Stormrend Riptide Subs will each attempt a stealth approach. All other factions begin in full war with each other — but will unite against whoever controls the Nexus.

typed_objectives.label: Be the last faction standing in the air
